name: project-init
description: Plugins extracted from the project-init scaffolder: forge-agnostic quality and safety hooks plus general skills (project-init-workflow), and GitHub issue->branch->PR->review->merge lifecycle automation (project-init-lifecycle).

plugins.name: project-init-workflow
plugins.description: Forge-agnostic quality + safety hooks and general skills for projects scaffolded by project-init — the always-on core payload (commit gate, lint-on-edit, prod-safety, session bootstrap). --no-plugin scaffolds copy the same files locally instead (ADR-010).

plugins.name: project-init-lifecycle
plugins.description: GitHub lifecycle automation (#476, ADR-021): the issue->branch->PR->review->merge DAG guard + workflow-state hooks and the lifecycle skills. Enabled only when the lifecycle tier is on; declined by a --lifecycle none scaffold.
